dialogueChunks.intro: The inventory count moved up, {player_name}. We're out of time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} announced a surprise audit: they're counting the storehouse supplies tonight, not tomorrow. The supplies you gathered aren't enough to replace everything I took. Worse, the neighbor's children are sick now: the food helped, but what they really need is medicine. I need you to gather more {quest_item} to fill the gap AND find healing herbs in the wilds {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} have been thick along the treeline, but those children can't wait for a safer day.
dialogueChunks.outro: One act of kindness turned into a cascade of problems. I don't regret it. But I need your help more than ever now.

playerResponses.text: Sick children and a ticking clock. I'll move fast.
Every time I turn around, this gets more complicated. But those kids need help.
You're in too deep. Turn yourself in before it gets worse.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the search is getting closer. {target_npc} questioned my sister this morning.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The questioning was polite but thorough. {target_npc} knows something is off but can't prove it yet. Meanwhile, the escape route {location_hint} has been compromised: a patrol of {enemy_type} set up camp right across the path. The deserter is growing desperate, talking about turning themselves in to spare my sister. I need you to clear that route and find an alternate path. And I need {quest_item} to provision the journey: food, clothing, anything to help them start a new life.
dialogueChunks.outro: If the soldier surrenders, my sister goes down too for harboring them. I won't let my sister hang for having a kind heart.

playerResponses.text: Clear the route, provision the journey. I'll make it happen.
Your sister's kindness shouldn't cost her life. Let me handle the monsters.
The net is closing and I'm helping you slip through it. This is going to end badly.

dialogueChunks.intro: They almost caught me, {player_name}. An enforcer was watching the house where I distribute the remedies.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I had to destroy a week's worth of medicine to keep it from being seized as evidence. People who were counting on those remedies are going without treatment now. {target_npc} pulled me aside and warned me: the guild is hiring a tracker to find the source of the unlicensed medicine. I need to move my operation somewhere hidden. There's an old herbalist's cottage {location_hint}, abandoned after the {enemy_type} moved into the area. If you can clear it out and gather more {quest_item} from the surrounding hills, I can set up a new brewing station the guild will never find.
dialogueChunks.outro: I destroyed medicine that sick people needed. The guilt is crushing. Help me make more before anyone suffers for my caution.

playerResponses.text: A hidden cottage and fresh ingredients. We'll have medicine flowing again in no time.
The guild is closing in. A hidden location is smart. Let's move.
Enforcers and trackers. You're going to get us both caught.
